pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 17 would result in incorrect bytecode or compilation errors if Java 21 features are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo version to 0.8.15-SNAPSHOT to support Java 21 instrumentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or report coverage for classes compiled with Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 21 is deprecated and may cause warnings or errors; release is the standard for cross-compilation.
